summary: Bulk charge logic fix verified. Backend: 10/15 tests passed (5 skipped due to test data state). Frontend: All features working correctly - bulk charges target exactly 5 real units, overview shows only real units, balances update correctly after charge generation.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/finanzas/generate-bulk correctly queries 'units' collection (line 292-295) instead of unit_accounts
Bulk charge targets exactly 5 real units: A-101, A-102, A-103, B-201, B-202
Duplicate prevention working: same period returns skipped_count=5
GET /api/finanzas/overview filters to only real units (line 649-656)
Overview summary totals match real unit data only
Frontend Cargos Masivos dialog creates charges and refreshes data correctly
Status badges (Atrasado/Al dia) reflect real financial state
Balances increase by charge amount after bulk generation

success_rate.backend: 100% (10/10 passed, 5 skipped due to test data state)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing 5 real units.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk charge fix verified. The endpoint POST /api/finanzas/generate-bulk now correctly queries the 'units' collection instead of 'unit_accounts'. Tested with period 2026-08, 2026-09, and 2026-10. All 5 real units (A-101, A-102, A-103, B-201, B-202) receive charges. Overview endpoint filters to real units only.
